falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes below 4000 (key support level) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below this level would indicate continued bearish momentum, contradicting the bottom pattern and invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff pressure would suggest a different market phase (e.g., blowoff top), directly contradicting the bottom pattern's expectations.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year Treasury yield rises above 5.25% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp increase in bond yields would indicate strong inflationary pressures or risk-on sentiment, undermining the conditions typically associated with a market bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
